title: Stavanger Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Stavanger, with a Z-Score of -3.23. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stavanger are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The HDD value of 12.3 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no demand for cooling. 
 The humidity level of 82% and wind speed of 4.3 km/h are also contributing to the harsh weather conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
